name: Umang Dairies Limited
summary: Umang Dairies Limited provides dairy products in India. The company offers skimmed milk powder, whole milk powder, dairy powder, sterilized paneer, dairy creamers, ghee, and butter, as well as cheese, butter, lassi, curd, and fresh cream under the JK Dairy White Magik, JK Dairy Top, Umang Ghee, and JK Dairy Milk Star brand names. The company also exports its SMP and dairy creamers for use in pre-mix for tea and coffee vending machines to the Middle East, Africa, and Asia. Umang Dairies Limited was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in New Delhi, India. Umang Dairies Limited is a subsidiary of Bengal and Assam Company Ltd.
